subject: Engine repower note - March auto-draft confirmation
body_preview: March auto-draft of 875.00 posted for the F/V Bay Runner engine repower note. Balance is on schedule. Reply if you need the year to date interest breakdown.

subject: Slip B-17 spring statement and lift schedule
body_preview: Slip B-17 seasonal invoicing continues at 425 per month. Yard lift and haul-out slot is confirmed for the last week of March. Reply with your preferred lift date so we can hold the sling.

subject: Hull and liability certificate renewal window
body_preview: Your combined hull and liability policy renews April 1 2027. Certificates for slip and haul-out are ready for signature. Nothing binding until you countersign the packet.

subject: Crew day rate confirmation for opener
body_preview: Tommy back for the opener. DJ and Mike are in. Day rates hold at what payroll has on file. Nothing has changed on my end since last season.

subject: Summer 2027 charter slate - awaiting your sign-off
body_preview: Slate draft is in HubSpot for the summer. Whitcomb full day with deposit already down. Kendall full day repeat. Robinson half day. Three more inquiries held for date confirmation. Waiting on your read before I close anything.

subject: Standing dockside order confirmed for April opener
body_preview: Standing order continues at prior season terms per pound. Confirm dockside settlement rhythm within the week of landing. No changes to pickup point.

subject: Diesel dock pricing week of March 29
body_preview: Dock diesel holds steady for the week. Statement will follow the usual monthly cycle. Reply if you want the block reserved ahead of the opener.

subject: Menhaden and razor clam allocation for opener week
body_preview: Opener week bait allocation is on the sheet. Draft order is ready for your confirmation before we hold stock. Nothing gets loaded until you say the word.

subject: 2027 Chesapeake Bay Commercial Crab Pot Registration and Pre-Season Notice
from_name: Maryland Department of Natural Resources Fisheries Service
body_preview: Your commercial crab pot license for the 2027 season is registered for a total of 900 pots. Every pot fished must carry the current registration tag. For the 2027 season all pots must display the new season tag color and the prior year tags are no longer valid on the water. Registered pots must be tagged and inspection ready before the pot inspection deadline of April 15 2027. The commercial season opens April 1 2027.
